name: Tingyun
desc: Amicassador of the Sky-Faring Commission of the Xianzhou Luofu.\nShe travels with business delegates, forging trade relationships and alliances with many worlds.

1.name: Windfall of Lucky Springs
1.desc: After using their Ultimate, the ally with Benediction gains a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> increase in SPD for 1 turn.

2.name: Gainfully Gives, Givingly Gains
2.desc: The ally with Benediction regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy after defeating an enemy. This effect can only be triggered once per turn.

3.name: Halcyon Bequest
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Jovial Versatility
4.desc: The DMG multiplier provided by Benediction increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: Sauntering Coquette
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Peace Brings Wealth to All
6.desc: Ultimate regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> more Energy for the target ally.

120201.name: Dislodged
120201.desc: Tingyun deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of her ATK to one designated enemy.
120201.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to one enemy.

120202.name: Soothing Melody
120202.desc: Grants a single ally with Benediction to increase their ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Tingyun's current ATK.\nWhen the ally with Benediction attacks, they will deal Lightning <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of that ally's ATK for 1 time.\nBenediction lasts for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s) and is only effective on the most recent receiver of Tingyun's Skill.
120202.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Increases the ATK</color> of a single ally and grants them Benediction. Ally with Benediction additionally deals minor <color=#f29e38ff>Lightning <u>Additional DMG</u></color> when attacking.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

120203.name: Amidst the Rejoicing Clouds
120203.desc: Regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy for a single ally and increases the target's DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
120203.simple_desc: Regenerates a target ally's <color=#f29e38ff>Energy</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>increases their DMG dealt</color>.

120204.name: Violet Sparknado
120204.desc: When an enemy is attacked by Tingyun, the ally with Benediction immediately deals Lightning <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of that ally's ATK to the same enemy.
120204.simple_desc: When an enemy is attacked by Tingyun, the ally with Benediction immediately deals minor Lightning <u>Additional DMG</u> to the same enemy.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

120206.name: Attack
120206.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

120207.name: Gentle Breeze
120207.desc: Tingyun immediately regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy upon using her Technique.
120207.simple_desc: After using this Technique, this character immediately regenerates Energy for themselves.

1.point_desc: Tingyun's SPD increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for 1 turn after using Skill.
DMG dealt by Basic ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
Tingyun immediately regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy at the start of her turn.
